---
title: "Child Penalty Nepal"
author : "Suhishan Bhandari"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-depth: 3
    page-layout: full
    fontsize: 1.1em
    mainfont: system-ui
---

# Introduction


## Child Penalty Estimates (obtained with exact matching with inclusion of districts)
![](images/og/penalty_est_01.png)

![](images/og/penalty_est_11.png)

![](images/og/penalty_est_join.png)


## Child Penalty Estimates (obtained with exact matching with exclusion of districts)

![](images/og/penalty_est_nodis_01.png)

![](images/og/penalty_est_nodis_11.png)

![](images/og/penalty_est_join_nodis.png)
